# MuleSoft Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK)

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.8) of Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK) documentation.
> See [Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK) llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/llms-full.txt) for all the Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK) documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Applying Custom Policies](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-apply-policies.md)
- [Policy Development Kit Architecture Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-architecture.md)
- [Compiling Custom Policies](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-compile-policies.md)
- [Accessing Request Authentication Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-authentication.md)
- [Sharing Data Between Workers and Configuring Caching](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-caching.md)
- [Using Contracts Validation Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-contracts.md)
- [Using CORS Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-cors.md)
- [Configuring Data Storage](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-data-storage.md)
- [Reading and Writing Request Headers and Bodies with Seperate Event States](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-headers-event.md)
- [Reading and Writing Request Headers and Bodies with Stop Iteration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-headers-stop.md)
- [Reading and Writing Request Headers and Bodies](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-headers.md)
- [Performing an HTTP Call](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-http-request.md)
- [Injecting Parameters](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-inject-parameters.md)
- [Filter IP Addresses](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-ip-filter.md)
- [Using JSON Validator Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-json-validator.md)
- [Using JWT Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-jwt.md)
- [Using Third-Party Libraries](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-libraries.md)
- [Configuring Policy Logging](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-logging.md)
- [Accessing Policy Metadata](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-metadata.md)
- [Rate Limiting Requests](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-rate-limiting.md)
- [Sharing Data Between Requests and Responses](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-share-data.md)
- [Using Spike Control Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-spike-control.md)
- [Stopping Request and Response Execution](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-stop.md)
- [Sharing Data Between Policies](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-streamproperties.md)
- [Configuring Delayed, Periodic, and Synchronous Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-timer.md)
- [Using OAuth 2.0 Token Introspection Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-token-introspection.md)
- [Reporting Policy Violations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-violations.md)
- [Using XML Validator Library Functions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features-xml-validator.md)
- [Implementing Your Custom Policy Features in Rust](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-features.md)
- [Configuring a Network Proxy for PDK](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-configure-network-proxy.md)
- [Creating a New Policy Project](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-create-project-overview.md)
- [Creating a Split-Model Policy Project](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-create-project-split.md)
- [Creating a Unified-Model (Regular) Policy Project](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-create-project.md)
- [Defining a Policy Schema Definition](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-create-schema-definition.md)
- [Debugging Deployed Custom Policies](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-debug-deployed-policies.md)
- [Debugging Custom Policies with the PDK Debugging Playground](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-debug-local.md)

- [Writing Integration Tests](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-integration-tests.md)
- [Creating Mule Gateway PDK Policies](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-mule-policies.md)

- [Custom Policy Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-policy-templates.md)

- [Writing Unit Tests](https://docs.mulesoft.com/pdk/latest/policies-pdk-unit.md)
